strengths: Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents, with direct experience building end-to-end enterprise automation tools at re:cinq and Optilyz.
Deep hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the required AI agent development qualification.

Demonstrated architectural breadth through open-source contributions (GISCollective), containerized deployments (Kubernetes), and multi-language systems (DLang, Java, Kotlin-equivalent), showing adaptability to evolving tech stacks.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest or Jest in resume, though testing culture is evident through TDD, CI/CD, and custom test runners (Trial, Fluent-Asserts).
No direct reference to Nest.js or PostgreSQL/MySQL in resume, though Node.js and relational/non-relational DB experience is present.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor communication challenges in a Berlin-based enterprise environment.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 6+ years of full-stack engineering, including direct work on AI-agent infrastructure and automation tooling at re:cinq, aligns tightly with the role’s core responsibilities; his consistent use of TypeScript, Node.js, React, and containerized deployments, combined with a demonstrated commitment to testing, scalability, and cross-stack problem-solving, makes him a compelling fit despite minor gaps in explicit tool mentions.
